AppLockerRules: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?><AppLockerPolicy Version="1"><RuleCollection Type="Exe" EnforcementMode="AuditOnly"><FilePublisherRule Id="921cc481-6e17-4653-8f75-050b76c3467b" Name="(Default Rule) All signed Microsoft executables" Description="This default rule permits the running of any application published by Microsoft." UserOrGroupSid="S-1-1-0" Action="Allow"><Conditions><FilePublisherCondition PublisherName="O=MICROSOFT CORPORATION, L=REDMOND, S=WASHINGTON, C=US" ProductName="*" BinaryName="*"><BinaryVersionRange LowSection="*" HighSection="*" /></FilePublisherCondition></Conditions><Exceptions></Exceptions></FilePublisherRule><FilePublisherRule Id="fd686d83-a829-4601-85d7-e37519979699" Name="(Default Rule) All signed Windows Installer packages" Description="This default rule permits the running of any Windows Installer packages from a signed publisher." UserOrGroupSid="S-1-1-0" Action="Allow"><Conditions><FilePublisherCondition PublisherName="O=MICROSOFT CORPORATION, L=REDMOND, S=WASHINGTON, C=US" ProductName="Windows Installer" BinaryName="*"><BinaryVersionRange LowSection="*" HighSection="*" /></FilePublisherCondition></Conditions><Exceptions></Exceptions></FilePublisherRule><FilePublisherRule Id="6d04b066-ce89-4d97-a27b-6b703b3e5918" Name="(Default Rule) All signed scripts" Description="This default rule permits the running of any scripts that are signed by a publisher." UserOrGroupSid="S-1-1-0" Action="Allow"><Conditions><FilePublisherCondition PublisherName="*" ProductName="*" BinaryName="*"><BinaryVersionRange LowSection="*" HighSection="*" /></FilePublisherCondition></Conditions><Exceptions></Exceptions></FilePublisherRule><FileHashRule Id="3d57af4d-c30b-4618-bccb-76e7f664cb91" Name="(Default Rule) All files located in the Windows folder" Description="This default rule permits the running of any application that is located in the Windows folder." UserOrGroupSid="S-1-1-0" Action="Allow"><Conditions><FileHashCondition><FileHash Type="SHA1" Data="E469ECA9556989CFC2560BD3BED8B2D3" SourceFileName="*" SourceFileLength="*" /></FileHashCondition></Conditions><Exceptions></Exceptions></FileHashRule><FilePathRule Id="921cc481-6e17-4653-8f75-050b76c3467c" Name="Allow Program Files" Description="Allows execution of applications in Program Files" UserOrGroupSid="S-1-1-0" Action="Allow"><Conditions><FilePathCondition Path="C:\Program Files\*" /></Conditions><Exceptions></Exceptions></FilePathRule></RuleCollection><RuleCollection Type="Dll" EnforcementMode="AuditOnly"><FilePublisherRule Id="921cc481-6e17-4653-8f75-050b76c3467d" Name="(Default Rule) All signed DLLs" Description="This default rule permits the running of any DLLs that are signed by a publisher." UserOrGroupSid="S-1-1-0" Action="Allow"><Conditions><FilePublisherCondition PublisherName="*" ProductName="*" BinaryName="*"><BinaryVersionRange LowSection="*" HighSection="*" /></FilePublisherCondition></Conditions><Exceptions></Exceptions></FilePublisherRule></RuleCollection><RuleCollection Type="Script" EnforcementMode="AuditOnly"><FilePublisherRule Id="921cc481-6e17-4653-8f75-050b76c3467e" Name="(Default Rule) All signed scripts" Description="This default rule permits the running of any scripts that are signed by a publisher." UserOrGroupSid="S-1-1-0" Action="Allow"><Conditions><FilePublisherCondition PublisherName="*" ProductName="*" BinaryName="*"><BinaryVersionRange LowSection="*" HighSection="*" /></FilePublisherCondition></Conditions><Exceptions></Exceptions></FilePublisherRule></RuleCollection></AppLockerPolicy>
